title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
